product_results.title: GoodValue Mens Running Shoes Tennis Lightweight Air Cushion Sports Shoes Fashion Athletic Breathable Mesh Upper Walking Sneakers Casual for Gym

summary.text: Customers find these shoes comfortable with no aches. They describe them as decent sneakers with a great fit that sits perfectly on feet. The shoes look good and are very visible for cycling. Customers appreciate that they are light and nice light shoes. However, customers have mixed opinions on durability, size, and sole hardness.

authors_reviews.title: Really good fit and comfort for the money
authors_reviews.text: I usually buy inexpensive shoes for work, so I took a chance on these. I gotta, say they were comfy right away, no breakin period needed. I just got them so no idea what kind of wear and tear they'll put up with yet......but either way, once I need new shoes for work I'll be buying these again. More colours would be nice.....but hey, not too shabby.-Drew(Canada)
authors_reviews.author: Drew Marshall

authors_reviews.title: Comfortable affordable shoes
authors_reviews.text: Light weight and surprisingly comfortable. The name speaks for itself as it is good value. Material quality is good and so far they are living up to my expectations.
authors_reviews.author: Roberto

authors_reviews.title: The size didn’t fit
authors_reviews.text: It’s a solid product, however, the size on the app didn’t exactly fit.
authors_reviews.author: I haven’t received my package , but it shows delivered on the app, I have called and was asked by the A.I to wait for up to 48 hours. I’ll be glad if this is resolved and I receive my item

authors_reviews.title: Little unsure it's only been a day
authors_reviews.text: I only wore them for one day but seem pretty comfortable as I work at a golf course so on my feet all day for 10 hours. Feet were a little sore at the end of the day though
authors_reviews.author: Christopher Fairbank

authors_reviews.title: Très bon choix
authors_reviews.text: Très très belle basket. Comforme à l'image.
authors_reviews.author: Roméo BOUE

authors_reviews.title: Terrible quality shoe defective soles
authors_reviews.text: Beautiful color, nice fit. That’s it. Completely worn out sole in 5 weeks worn only for ride in bus to and from school. Sole has hole from inside to outside in both heels. Is obviously a defect as it happened in both shoes.
authors_reviews.author: Mellissa W.

authors_reviews.title: Stylish at a decent price
authors_reviews.text: Very stylish and hold up well in most types of weather. For the price, they are well worth it
authors_reviews.author: Daryl J Ball
